shot.composition: Full shot of the store owner holding a smartphone, close-up on the screen showcasing the Takلفة app.
shot.camera_motion: Smooth zoom in from a wide shot to a close-up focusing on the app interface.

subject.description: A friendly and relatable Saudi store owner in his 30s, representing a typical small business owner.
subject.wardrobe: Casual Saudi attire - a thawb or a shirt and pants combo, reflecting a modern yet traditional look.
subject.mic_position: Wireless lavalier mic beneath the thawb/shirt.

scene.location: Inside the store, at the counter, surrounded by products.
scene.environment: A well-lit, tidied local store, creating a welcoming vibe.

visual_details: action 1: The owner is adding products to his store on Takلفة using his smartphone.
action 2: The screen shows the AI automatically filling product details upon photo upload.
action 3: The owner grins and nods, pleased with how easy it is. Cut to a sequence of customers entering the shop.

cinematography.lighting: Warm and inviting, using a mix of natural and artificial lights.
cinematography.tone: Upbeat and positive, reflecting ease and efficiency.

audio.ambient: Soft, realistic shop sounds - distant conversations, beeping of a cash register.

voice.tone: Enthusiastic and clear, with a slight Saudi accent.
talk: Owner: "تخيل سهولة إدارة متجرك عبر جوالك! #تكلفة سهّل علينا كل شي!"

audio.lyrics: Upbeat Arabic pop music in the background, faded down to emphasize voiceover.

shot.composition: Split screen: left side shows traditional marketing (flyers in the trash, billboards). Right side shows the Takلفة app on a phone.
shot.camera_motion: Smooth, slow pan across both sides of the split screen.

subject.description: No specific subject on camera; focus remains on the visuals.

scene.location: Various locations that represent traditional marketing frustration and the digital market.

visual_details: action 1: Shots of discarded flyers blown in the wind.
action 2: A static billboard being overlooked by passing cars.
action 3: On the other side, quick cuts of the Takلفة app interface: orders coming in, maps highlighting business location, etc.

cinematography.lighting: Contrast the depressing, grey look of traditional side with the cleaner, more vibrant look of the digital/Takلفة side.

audio.ambient: Environmental sounds of traffic, wind, etc., on the traditional side.

voice.tone: Authoritative and informative voiceover with a Saudi accent.
voice.style: Professional, serious at first then becoming more positive as it transitioned into Takلفة.
talk: Voiceover: "التسويق التقليدي يكلف ويضيع وقتك. ودّع الإعلانات القديمة وقدّم متجرك مع #تكلفة!"

audio.lyrics: A rising music trend as the screen focuses on Takلفة

shot.composition: Close-up of a smartphone screen, fingers typing and navigating within the Takلفة app.
shot.camera_motion: Close-up zooms and pans to highlight specific features.

subject.description: Faceless hands represent any store owner.

visual_details: action 1: A finger taps the ‘Add Product’ button.
action 2: Phone takes picture – AI generates title and description.
action 3: Finger inputs price, product is added, a map opens up showing the store location on the map.

voice.tone: A friendly and informative female voice, with a clear Saudi accent.
talk: Voiceover: "#تكلفة: صور منتجك، والذكاء الاصطناعي يكمل الباقي! سجل اليوم وزود مبيعاتك!"

audio.lyrics: Catchy, trendy music playing in the background.

shot.composition: A series of quick cuts showcasing different local shop owners giving thumbs up while having their phone on their ear. Focus is on positivity and trustworthiness.
shot.camera_motion: Quick cuts for fast-paced and catchy visuals.

subject.description: Variety of different local store owners giving testimonials.
subject.wardrobe: Typical local clothing, casual but presentable.

scene.location: Inside different types of local shops.
scene.environment: Varied, to give a good visual impact

visual_details: action 1: Smiling shop owner giving a thumbs up.
action 2: Phone screen displays the #تكلفة logo
action 3: Owners have a positive look on their face, as if someone gave great news on the phone.

voice.tone: Reliable and upbeat with Saudi accent.
voice.style: Fast and snappy remarks to cut short testimonial.
talk: Shop owner 2: سهل وسريع! أنصح به!
Shop owner 3: زادت أرباحي بشكل ملحوظ!
